name: vault
description: Remote document & context store for Claude — MCP tools, multi-vault manager, and automatic session sync.

vault_url.title: Vault URL
vault_url.description: Your vault server's base URL, WITHOUT the /mcp suffix (the plugin appends it). E.g. https://longku-vault.zeabur.app

vault_token.title: Vault token
vault_token.description: Bearer token for your vault. Leave blank if you configure vaults via the vault-manager skill instead (that user-scope config overrides this).
